evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement data quality and validation processes to guarantee data accuracy and consistency.
evidence.domain_risk: Establish the KPIs and metrics that will be used by the business
evidence.collaboration_width: our tech and product teams; our marketing and product teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services; Create and maintain data architecture and data models for various business domains.

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Implement data quality and validation processes to guarantee data accuracy and consistency.
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The responsibilities emphasize data accuracy, consistency, and validation as core expectations, with no language signaling speed or iteration velocity.
domain_risk_quote: Establish the KPIs and metrics that will be used by the business
domain_risk_reasoning: Business-critical role but no explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language suggesting high-risk consequences.
collaboration_width_teams: our tech and product teams; our marketing and product teams
data_team_maturity_quote: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services.
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Named tools deployed in the responsibilities (dbt, AWS services) indicate an existing data function with infrastructure in a growth and enhancement phase, not a greenfield build.
jd_authorship_quote: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services; Create and maintain data architecture and data models for various business domains.
jd_authorship_reasoning: The responsibilities contain specific technical tools, methodologies (ETL/ELT, data modeling), and precise application context that only someone with hands-on data engineering experience would articulate.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Plan, execute, and evaluate experiments with our marketing and product teams.
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Core responsibility for planning and executing experiments is a product analytics function, and product teams are mentioned explicitly in multiple responsibilities.
autonomy_level_quote: Establish and implement data requirements and analytics solutions with our tech and product teams.
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role strategically establishes what to measure, architect, and implement (strategic verbs), but does so collaboratively 'with' product and engineering teams in service of their priorities (execution framing).
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services
ai_role_quote: Design, construct, and enhance data pipelines utilizing SQL, Python, dbt, git, and AWS services
ai_role_reasoning: Standard data engineering tech stack with no AI tools (Copilot/Claude Code/Cursor) or GenAI infrastructure responsibilities mentioned.
testing_framing_quote: Implement data quality and validation processes to guarantee data accuracy and consistency
testing_framing_reasoning: The verb 'implement' paired with 'data quality and validation processes' signals candidate owns the quality practice, not just a tool in the stack.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Implement data quality and validation processes to guarantee data accuracy and consistency
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Quality framing focuses on delivery (accuracy, consistency) without operational reliability signals (SLOs, incidents, pipeline stability) or compliance/trust signals (regulatory, audit, bad data risk).
